<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

#### What is the {{< var validmind.checker >}}?

:::: {.flex .flex-wrap .justify-around}

::: {.w-25-ns .pt3 .pr4}
![{{< var vm.checker >}}](/about/overview-llm-features-check-document.png){fig-alt="A screenshot showing the LLM feature for checking documentation that can be accessed with the Check Document button"}

:::

::: {.w-75-ns}
{{< include /guide/documentation/_document-checker.qmd >}}


<!-- VISIBLE ONLY ON PAGES THAT **DO NOT** HAVE A CUSTOM METADATA TAG:

```includes:
    customize: true
``` -->


:::: {.content-visible when-format="html" when-meta="includes.customize"}
Customizing the {{< var validmind.checker >}} to support your organization's unique regulatory requirements and policies helps start quality assurance early in record lifecycles and enables individual contributors to actively participate in risk-management oversight.

::::

:::: {.content-visible when-format="html" unless-meta="includes.customize"}
As a compliance tool, the {{< var validmind.checker >}} is most useful when your documentation or report is sufficiently complete and you are preparing records for regulatory submission or internal audit, as it helps reduce manual review effort and improve quality assurance.

::::

:::

::::

<br>

<span id="default-regulations"></span>

::: {.callout-button .pl4 .nt4}
::: {.callout collapse="true" appearance="minimal"}
### What regulations are supported by default?

By default, {{< var vm.product >}} supports the following regulations:

- Federal Reserve Supervisory Letter SR 26-2 (United States)
- Bank of England Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) Supervisory Statement SS1/23 (United Kingdom)
- Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions (OSFI) Guideline E-23 (Canada)
- European Union Artificial Intelligence Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, EU AI Act)

:::
:::
